Axe of the Kromzek Kings  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 36
DMG: 37 Dmg Bonus: 132
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +25 STA: +20 HP: +100
SV FIRE: +7 SV DISEASE: +7 SV COLD: +7 SV MAGIC: +7 SV POISON: +7
WT: 20.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

# Feb 26 2006 at 2:23 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592764060581
103 posts
Quote:
[/quote]CONCLUSION: Get whatever race you think "look" the best for you. Pick what you think you want to RolePlay or something you want to enjoy watching while playing. I LOVE the Barbarian Female Plate armor.. its RARE because only Barbarian Female Warriors can wear it.. Unlike other races, say humans you can find SK Human with plate, Pallie human with PLate, Cleric human with plate... etc so its not rare. But when you look at a Barbarian Warrior, that's the only class for barbarians that can wear plate. So, you'd look "unique" and since all racials abilities doesnt matter much and of course starting stats means NOTHING.. just pick whatever you think looks good! [quote]


Stop talking a bunch of BS about other people chosing what races in the beginning and basically bribing them in the end to play a barbarian yeah u say just chose whatever u want well dont mention any of the BS in the firstplace then.

Hmm... my main is a Shaman, and we never get a lightning based... anything
▲ Page top
To all newbies
QuoteReply
# Jun 29 2005 at 2:27 AM Rating: Decent
farzooma
Scholar
17 posts

Alright, for everyone saying this race is a better warrior because they got more STA/STR whatever is just simply new to the game or didn't reach a high enough level to realize something. At the high end game (not really, even med game if you're rich) items would set you to your stats MAX EASILY!.. ALL warriors will be able to have full stats with decent gear so it doesnt really matter what beginning stats you're going to get them maxed. All these extra stats ogres get are just a waste eventually. Gnome or Ogre both can have 305+ STR, STA..etc with decent items.

Now, it goes down to the racial abilities.

Ogres: Can not be stunned from front (note this is only the "bash" stun not a spell or proc stun ok?). All big races (including ogres) get a Slam which is a Bash without using a shield. Doesn't matter much its puny DPS but helps aganst casters. Warriors don't solo much so who cares? let your friends stun casters. Besides Bash/Slam isnt the best stunning skills out there. PLUS, ALL classes can get a 2HandBash AA easily eventually, my DarkElf SK can "slam" (2 Hand Bash).

Trolls: Good regeneration. But worthless at higher level when monsters hit for 600ish at teir2 PoP or 1200ish at harder spots (these are trash monsters mind you, what would a +10 regen help you there?!). You also get a 20% XP penalty not sure if they've changed that now.

Iksars: Good regeneartion (see above why it sucks) and plus AC which is an ok ability. 20% XP penalty.

Barbarians and Humans are blind at night. Barbarians can Slam since they are considered a huge race.

VahShir got infravision (not Ultra) can slam and sneak.. also safe fall. All are REALLY worthless as sstates above. For Sneak yeah this is helpful for buying from hostile vendor. But Infravision and SafeFall aren't really that much since you get items with Ultravision eventually!

WoodElves Forage I think? worthless

Dark Elves Hide --> semi-worthless and Ultravision --> best vision but you can get an item with Ultravision.

Humans are blind at night, nothing special about them.

Half Elves, I think they got Infravision and thats about it unless I"ve forgotten something.

CONCLUSION: Get whatever race you think "look" the best for you. Pick what you think you want to RolePlay or something you want to enjoy watching while playing. I LOVE the Barbarian Female Plate armor.. its RARE because only Barbarian Female Warriors can wear it.. Unlike other races, say humans you can find SK Human with plate, Pallie human with PLate, Cleric human with plate... etc so its not rare. But when you look at a Barbarian Warrior, that's the only class for barbarians that can wear plate. So, you'd look "unique" and since all racials abilities doesnt matter much and of course starting stats means NOTHING.. just pick whatever you think looks good!




____________________________
http://www.BlueFrost.net
▲ Page top
blah blah blah
QuoteReply
# Aug 05 2004 at 7:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591753729926
13 posts
i started eq before i knew better and made a human warrior, now that he is lvl 65 and equiped to the teeth and when buffed all my stats (str,sta,dex,agi) are beyond maxed it no longer matter what race i am, i could go toe to toe with one of you big ugly ogres that need a shrink every time ya dungeaon crawl because casters cant see past your fat a$$. and beide this forum is about an axe remember even if someone did ask about what class is best:P
luckily for my human in my infancy i chose rallos zek as my god so i got the smokin cultural armor :)
▲ Page top
RE: blah blah blah
QuoteReply
# Dec 23 2004 at 2:56 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591788855623
274 posts
Yep, Ogres are immune to stuns from the front. In addition, they have the ability to slam, which works like bash, except you don't need a shield. That's got a chance to stun YOU, by the way, if you fight an Ogre. And you need magic shoulders to slam magical beings, fyi.

Now, when being stunned isn't an issue (especially if you have a 1hs/b pally/sk or a large race in the group/raid... for stunning the mob itself), I prefer the Iksar. Every tick, it's like 7 hp or so more is added to your total hit point pool (over what other races have). Don't think that and a bit of extra AC makes a difference? Just a couple days ago, I was sitting at a zoneline /afk. It was stupid, I know, but I didn't expect to be long. Well, I was, and when I came back, a green mob was beating on me. Well, this green mob had been beating on me for a VERY long time, at least 5 minutes, from the combat "spam". I zoned as quickly as I could, and when I checked my hp, I had 39 left.

How's that for making a difference?

That IS just one example, btw. I have many more I remember, but my Iksar HAS, in fact, been stunned, but has never died because of it.

Now, granted, it WOULD be nice to be able to deal with casters better...

Edit: BTW, Iksar CAN wear plate, for ANYONE who says that. My Iksar is wearing plate right NOW, in fact. The "can't wear plate" issue stopped at Velious. Velious+ plate Iksars can wear. Any plate before that... well, even my untwinked BST has better gear than that plate, it seems...

Edit2: I was saved again by my regen over in Stonebrunt. After quite a while of killing, I got poisoned and was very low on health as an elder silverback jumped on me. I managed to zone in time to save myself, with barely any HP remaining.

Edited, Thu Dec 30 19:54:49 2004

#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 14 2002 at 11:40 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) what is bonous dmg? does it mean that besides the dmg you do it ads 16dmg?
RE: bonus dmg?
QuoteReply
# Jan 10 2003 at 1:37 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591780630762
18 posts
Bonus damage is based on your level as a melee. Yes, it adds to the base damage, but just because it says 16 for the guy who took the screenshot doesn't mean you'll get that at your level.

Who thinks the best warrior race is?

Best of the good is:

Best of the evil is:

Best of the best is:

# Aug 12 2002 at 6:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591779797344
129 posts
Barbarian Good
Ogre Evil

Ogre best

In the end it's almost all the same. Fatties don't need to ghetto bash and can't get front-stunned.
▲ Page top
RE: I have a question, maybe poll
QuoteReply
# Sep 10 2002 at 9:09 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1638145982070
View User Forum
Sage
201 posts
/agree

Barbs are the best good race. But Vah SHir do get infravision and safe fall, and there lost is str and sta to a barb isn't much.

As for evil Ogres. Ogre>all hands down. They have more str and sta without adding starting points than most other races can achieve after spending those points. Plus not being stunned from a frotal attack is a major advantage. Plus an agnostic ogre has less of a faction problem than a troll, and far better than iksar. (and agnogstic DE can bank in fp with base faction).

But my question is this. Why would anyone ever play (other than for RP reasons) anything other than ogre or troll warrior? And why ever play an Isar warrior? I mean Iksar level slower than any other race, have a much narrower armour selection for warriors, have the worse faction of any starting race, and only have better stats than the wood elf (another big WTF IMHO)? I mean once you get to 46th you have a much higher chance of getting the roll on Hate iksar warroir drops. But there is a reason for that, no one plays an iksar warrior. Iksar are the clear choice for monk, and are clearly a bad choice for a warrior.

Of course these are the opinions for someone who wishes he could make his DE necro an iksar now. But wtf do I know?......
▲ Page top
RE: I have a question, maybe poll
QuoteReply
# Jun 04 2003 at 12:42 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591773994568
Guru
658 posts
Quote:
But Vah SHir do get infravision and safe fall, and there lost is str and sta to a barb isn't much.


Vah Shir also get another racial skill - Sneak. Not useful very often, but sometimes it really comes in handy.
▲ Page top
RE: I have a question, maybe poll
QuoteReply
# Jan 10 2003 at 1:18 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Quote:
But my question is this. Why would anyone ever play (other than for RP reasons) anything other than ogre or troll warrior?


Why quite simply, for no other reason than roleplay ones. In fact thats the whole reason I play ROLE PLAYING games.

Personally, I have a human warrior. Why, because I like human character. Nearly all my characters are either human or some sort of elf. The exceptions are my Erudite chanter, and my iksar shaman, who I created, so I could try something new.

Sure, The large race warriors are, by the numbers, better characters. And, by the numbers, halflings are supposed to be better druids, etc, etc....

Still, its fun to play one of the less common combos. If I actually get a second account, as I'm thinking of doing, I may start a halfling, in some melee class, just because I don't see many.And then maybe an erudite paladin :)

Bottom line is, most of the non-powergamers are playing the game to enjoy playing some fantasy character they like. Stats are nice, but in the end, most encounters won't be decided by the extra 100 HP the tank has, or the extra 5 wis the cleric started with....

Ao the alternate way of phrasing my first answer, is:

They do it for fun!!!
▲ Page top
RE: I have a question, maybe poll
QuoteReply
# Oct 12 2002 at 4:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591780810624
54 posts
Your comment on the trolls caught me a little off guard there. Me being a troll I have to say they are about as good as the ogres. A little less stats, and I don't really think the faction matters much, but the trolls do get the hp regen, which I love.

You start with 4 hp/tick and then at lvl 20 you get 6 hp/tick. Then 40 you get 8 and so on until at lvl 51+ you get major bonuses to the regen. This is always helpful in the lower and mid lvls, not really that important in high lvls though.

But even then you have to consider what good was a starting bonus of 10 extra strength good for you at 55? Not much, so the ogres starting stats didn't do them THAT much good. Also with starting stats consider dex and agi. Now I'm not saying trolls are the nimblest of all creatues, of course not. But they are better, so that can offset the strength you guys start with, but like I said, it doesn't make that much of a difference as you get to high levels.

Also, really strength isn't all that important, because a tank does not deal damage, a tank takes the hits so the rogues and monks and casters can deal the mad crazy damage and not have to worry about getting whooped. Because the last time I checked, a wizzy or mage doesn't make a very spiffy tank.

Anyways this doesn't go for just trolls being equal to ogres, this shows that all races has their own little bonuses for them besides strength (well....I have to agree that iksars just friggin got shafted for warriors), because when it comes down to it you need just about every stat when you have to kill that monster.....FAST. YAAAAAAAAAAR

Edited, Sat Oct 12 17:07:24 2002
▲ Page top
RE: I have a question, maybe poll
QuoteReply
# Nov 23 2002 at 7:54 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1638145982070
View User Forum
Sage
201 posts
I didn't mean to slight Trolls. They are an excellent choice for warrior, and the hp regen is a great thing. But for high end encounters not being stunned from a frontal attack is more useful than regen. An ogre warrior is going to be MA over a troll if they have roughly the same ac/hp and tauntablity. Of course the person behind the toon is the most important factor in any class. I'd rather have a smart Iksar warrior than a dumb ogre any day, hands down.
▲ Page top
RE: I have a question, maybe poll
QuoteReply
# Apr 29 2003 at 9:11 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591787052873
5 posts
OK back on to good race tank's there is a new choice the FROG!! ok they may not have great starting str but they get good starting agi and dex i based my frog out at 105 str 95 sta 105 agi 100 dex a nice even spread that with a few well gotten item's u could near cap out all 4 stats and they look so cool.
▲ Page top
RE: I have a question, maybe poll
QuoteReply
# Sep 24 2002 at 8:46 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593966266483
51 posts
You have a lot to learn about this game. People play certain race/class combos simply because they want to. Saying that one race is better for a certain class is just dumb. They all have advantages and disadvantages. Plus, if you think that just STR and STA are important to a warrior, you're a little lost. You forgot AGI and DEX. Not to mention WIS and INT. Yes, WIS and INT are important, mainly for learning skills. Plus, why wouldn't you want to work on AGI. What good are all those HPs you have from all the STA and HP gear if you all you do is get hit? Sure it takes longer to get to 0 hp, but the poor cleric that's healing you would go OOM quicker. Don't forget DEX, DEX is very important for combat. You like to hit those creatures, right? Well, get that DEX up and you'll be hitting more often. I know, this really doesn't fit in for this item, but I needed to clear this up somewhere. Hope you learned something. Oh, and if you flame me, you're dumb.
▲ Page top
RE: I have a question, maybe poll
QuoteReply
# Mar 03 2004 at 9:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591788112673
37 posts
Bedlammeer, thank you so much for the lesson. However, it appears that you also have a lot to learn about the game, as you are more than a little lost.

As was already mentioned, the effects of Agi for a tank are minimal.

Dex has absolutely no impact on how often you hit in combat. It only affects the rate at which you proc, and rate at which you learn a few melee skills.

As far as I know, Wis OR Int (not both) is really only important for a warrior if the warrior wants to learn a tradeskill aside from blacksmithing.

As was also mentioned already, having a lot of hitpoints does NOT cause the cleric to go OOM faster once they get complete heal; in fact, it does the opposite.

Hope you learned something.

Oh, and by the way, if you start a post telling people that they need to learn about the game, and then give a bunch of wrong information, and THEN end by saying that anyone flaming you is dumb, you are BEGGING to be flamed. I'm posting this more to correct what I believe to be wrong information that you posted, rather than as a flame, but you surely deserve a bit of flaming.
▲ Page top
RE: I have a question, maybe poll
QuoteReply
# Nov 23 2002 at 7:47 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1638145982070
View User Forum
Sage
201 posts
Here is what I want to to do. Log-on to you server, go to the Bazaar or the Nexus, somewhere with a dozen or so post 50ies char's. And ask in /ooc if warriors care more about any stat than STA. Now think about this. If your warrior starts out with more sta, this leaves him room for straight hp items, str and dex/agi.

I don't care what class of warrior you play. And I have a Woodelf War friend who is a force to be dealt with. But I have to say again, other than for RP reasons, Ogre warriors own all. Yes the other stats have an effect. AC is a great thing to have, but for a warrior it comes from equipment and deffencive skill, very little is gained by agi. Dex is nice for raiseing skills and getting weapons to proc. Wis and/or Int (witchever is higher) is used for some skill raises true, but none of them are combat skills. So I dare you to find a warrior that will place dex, agi, wis or int over sta. Most will pick str over the others as well.

And as for clerics going oom sooner, this would only be true without complete heal. if you have more hitpoints, the cleric CHeals you less offten. And if you have over 2khp CHeal is going to be the only heal a cleric is going to want to use on you if he can. A tank with 2khp needs more CHeals than a tank with 4khp.
▲ Page top
RE: I have a question, maybe poll
QuoteReply
# Feb 02 2003 at 10:10 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766174364
7 posts
Then you get to the point where all your warriors are max STA, Dex = the number 2 stat for a warrior because his melee + taunt will not out agro that proc on the BOC, which means that the warrior will want more DEX because its the proc that will be holding the agro for him, not how hard he hits.
▲ Page top
DMG/DLY
QuoteReply
# Nov 09 2001 at 2:48 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361373528
Scholar
22 posts
The Stats on the weapon have changed slightly since this pic above...

DMG:37
Delay:36
DMG bouns (lvl 60): 31

other stats i believe are the same

▲ Page top
RE: DMG/DLY
QuoteReply
# Sep 10 2002 at 9:21 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1638145982070
View User Forum
Sage
201 posts
OK, one more time for those who don't read patch messages. The damage bonus is not new. It's always been there. They are just showing it to you so your weapon selection is more informed.

Also, the damage bonus is based on the level/class of the char useing it, and the delay/wepaon type of the weapon. A monk at level 30 has a different damage bonus with a Cane of the Tranquil than a 40 warrior.

Also keep in mind that two different classes at the same level that have the same damage bonus on the same weapon can and will do differant average damage. IE Monks do more damage than warriors. they have a higher damage table that is not reflected in the damage bonus. Of course that is something totally out of your control, so it's not really useful information.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 14 2001 at 2:37 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I have it and just got it on few day.,
it IS a warriors axe...
QuoteReply
# Aug 14 2001 at 7:21 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592248837442
95 posts
not all warriors are main tanks.
theres only one MAIN tank.
other warriors can still inflict a silly amount of damage with this babe.

keep in mind: NOT EVERY WARRIOR ON THIS PLANET IS MAIN TANK ALL THE TIME.
SOMETIMES WE ARE DAMAGE DEALERS TOO!

The number of people looking at you is directly proportional to the stupidity of your actions
▲ Page top
Weapon is good for...
QuoteReply
# Aug 08 2001 at 10:53 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Damage dealing.

When you get this weapon, you are in a end-gaming raiding guild. It means that you will have lots and lots of very tough fights with mobs taken by multiple groups and very few tanking warriors (sometimes, they need only one tank ... Aka Conquest with the warders). All the none-tanking warriors will be damage dealers, like monks, rangers and rogues.
BTW, the warrior epic can be converted from 2x1HS to 1x2HS... For tanking and none tanking warriors.
▲ Page top
RE: Weapon is good for...
QuoteReply
# May 16 2002 at 8:51 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591774704467
63 posts
I wouldnt use the 2hander War epic for nontanking.
It has the 500 hate proc as well, but with a higher damage. And since 2handers proc more per amount of swings you might get agro... I would use Blue blade mainhand or even better a non proc in main and bag red
▲ Page top
Warrior weapon
QuoteReply
# Aug 01 2001 at 11:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247296768
3 posts
Well this weapon is around warrior-epic 2h stats, getting more damage for less resists and proc. I have this and its more meant for dealing damage then for creating aggro. Its slow speed and no proc means no aggro. No aggro for a warrior means its pretty much useless.
▲ Page top
RE: Warrior weapon
QuoteReply
# Aug 16 2001 at 9:12 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592248837442
95 posts
dpnt forget haste my friend... good haste will make this weapon excellent
▲ Page top
Not so funny
QuoteReply
# Jul 18 2001 at 8:34 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361496102
1 post
It's pretty plain why a wiz looted it instead of a warrior. At that level of play, how many warriors are still using two-handed weapons? Show of hands, please. Anyone? No? That's what I thought.

The balance between dual-wielding and two-handed weapons is so extremely out-of-whack that no dual-wielding class in his/her right mind uses a two-handed weapon over two one-handed weapons, except in extreme circumstances where the mob has an absolutely huge damage shield. That two-hander would never get used by anyone in their guild, I'm sure, so the wizard probably looted it, got the stats, and destroyed it. That's about all it's worth. At least you can give primal two-handers to guildmates who don't have a primal one-hander yet, for the proc, and they can switch back after the proc.
▲ Page top
RE: Not so funny
QuoteReply

(lol, DIE ASTRALL DIE! =P) Wizards are greedy because they don't get phat lewt, and i know about 50 different warriors who use 2hs, i also have a ranger friend who uses some 43/45 sword he got at a GM event, hes been 2hslashing since level 1 also, i dont think a wizard should even be looting! lol, they are gr33dY! leave it to the warriors and the ones who deserve this item, if they want to pass it on or destroy it, let it be, but not the gr33dy *** wizard

# Mar 06 2002 at 9:29 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591768313462
52 posts
i agree. Although I may only be lvl 35, I know about looting. I have been playing for 2 years and every time we get something that no one wants or is no drop we leave it there and shout the loc. Just my two cents, nice quote:)

__DEL__1592756596690

Are you a complete moron? Really with a 38 damage and a measly 43 delay, what warrior with a haste item or 3(I'm sure at the level you can get this the warrior has this) would not use an item so hugely damaging? This is obviously a post from one of those people that play only pure casters and have never so much as tried a melee class. Get a clue and try a melee before you comment on what they should be using.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 29 2001 at 12:10 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Your the moron. I happen to play melee :P (ALL i play is melee) and i wouldn't use this as a warrior at all...maybe at low lvls just to get the skill up lol, but i wont be getting this at low lvls now will i. Its a nice axe and all, but way more suited for pally or SK. You get a higher taunt rate off of 1hnders and thats what the WARRIOR is there for. Only class id use 2hnd at higher lvls would be a monk so i wouldn't have such a taunt rate to keep the mob off me and still do lots of dmg with a 29/30 or so. His statement was way more informed than yours. You must be the caster only guy. Your like all those druids and stuff that twink up warriors or monks and then tell me how to play mine.

# Jul 31 2002 at 9:22 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591764408606
16 posts
OOOOOOOOOK!!

What 2h slash does for me, and the people I am grouping with, (Main is monk) alt is war)

But high dmg 2hs keeps the target on you and not the casters, see what I mean? but if u are partnering, use the 1h weapons, Fast dmg is better dmg, but if you have more melee in ur group and you are tank, 2hs is the way to go!

And! what's with all the RE:Not so funny? Lol

Take care all!

RE: Not so funny
QuoteReply
# Jan 22 2002 at 2:27 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591773687423
125 posts
i myself have not raised my skill in any weapon type besides 1hs 1hb and archery. my skill in 2hs is around 23. sheer quick dmg you can do with duel wield surpasses it in my eyes and the 2h weapons you can get around my lv would give a major stat reduce (i know theyre not my lv but i got a lamentation and css combo +wurmslayer if i wanna land the big hits) and with lammie css combo i have 10 str 6 sta 4 agi and 20 hp (and the 6 int 6 cha the css has but it dont matter) most 2handers ive seen that i could get ahold of were bare bones (i.e. no stats procs just dmg dly)and even then the wurmslayer matched them dmg wise and beat alot in dly department... this is just about the 2h skill... tho if i got ahold of this id use it (lotsa cash and points would go to my guild trainer)... some of my post prolly wont add up but writing was never my best skill (typing or whatever)
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 13 2001 at 9:53 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) How about a situation where the warrior in particular is not the primary tank of the group?

QuoteReply
# Aug 01 2001 at 5:50 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591763140376
182 posts
Dear Rainien, you accuse him from telling what to do, when actually YOU are the one telling that ever warrior in his right mind IS OBLIGATED to use 1h cause 2h sucks. Well let me tell you, this is the 9th best dmg/dly 2h weapon there is. And it's not because YOU think that 2h suck and should be taken out of game and blah blah blah, that you have to FORCE everyone to make the same choice as you. Everyone should make up their own mind. You do not own these people.
▲ Page top
RE: Not so funny
QuoteReply
# Aug 23 2003 at 12:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591776082168
47 posts
This axe is a pos and I have never seen it looted by a main yet. Everytime it drops and alt is CotH to the corpse to loot or it is /ooc'd to zone.

Very few warriors use two hand slash in any situation and when they do it is with far better weapons then this. One of the main reason for using two one hand weapons is the added ac and hps of two weapons over one. Alot of weapons have at least 75hps on them and when u add them together you will get greater then the 100hps on this axe. If you are killing tormax then you are probably doing NtoV and better warrior 2hs's drop there as a starter.

Ya can get ya knickers in a knot and say I would use this, I can see it's usefulness in "x" situation but by the time it comes around you will have better.

Its old world uber, and just like the Dain axe "Frostreaver" (which my alt Sk has had since level 36), you will see most of these go to alts or bagged by some warrior that will stick it in a bank and it will never see the light of day.

# Sep 22 2003 at 11:57 PM Rating: Default

Okay, speed of the shissar is a 66% haste. FBSS gives a 21% haste. The two stack... now, if I am mistaken, but that effectively means that the delay of this weapon is now below ten, somewhere around 8. So, you wouldn't like a 37 8 weapon? I would GLADLY sacrifice two 13 20's for this Billy Bad ***.
